summary: T22: Added 21 isolation-pattern tests (46 assertions) for Phase 2 components — ContextBridge threshold logic (9 tests: none/compress/compress_urgent at 50%/65%/72%/80%/95%, fail-open, null budget, custom thresholds), IntegrationLayer checkContextBudget (3 tests), recordTokenUsage (3 tests), task context eviction with 1-hour TTL (6 tests).
